title: pseudorlaya pumila var. breviaculeata
intro: Pseudorlaya pumila var. breviaculeata is a plant species commonly referred to as a variety of the Pseudorlaya pumila plant, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues such as nausea and indigestion. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving overall gut health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
